description: Create a fully-constrained 2D profile of a rectangular plate with four chamfered corners in SolveSpace. The profile must be a single closed loop of 8 line segments centered on the origin. The overall bounding box must be 80mm wide by 50mm tall, with 10mm chamfers at each corner (10mm removed from both horizontal and vertical edges). Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/chamfered_plate.slvs.
